title: Emo

content.value: Emo is a graphic score controlled by an AI algorithm for emotion recognition, developed for a workshop with oncologic patients. The system analyses text, weights and represents each of the five basic emotions, producing an ever-shifting graphic score.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}
_comment_links: To add external links, add objects like: {"label": "GitHub", "url": "https://..."}
